title: デビュー戦の後に・フライト延長希望！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mayano Top Gun has successfully
made her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's been acting strange for a while...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Nothing's really the matter... It's just that
it's over!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Is this it?! Is my debut really finished? Just like
that?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're not hiding anything from me, are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but a debut match is something
that can only be experienced once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She doesn't seem the slightest bit satisfied.
choice_data_list: Should we run in more races?
Should we run in more races?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I've finally debuted. I've come all this
way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's something that's supposed to make you
excited—make you twinkle.
